case_title: US BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION AS TRUSTEE, SUCCESSOR VS. QI QUANG HU et al

docket_entries.description: EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT HU, QI QUANG PEREZ, DAVID DOES 1 THRU 10, INCL.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF US BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION AS TRUSTEE, SUCCESSOR  IN INTEREST TO WACHOVIA BANK N.A. AS TRUSTEE FOR  MERRILL LYNCH MORTGAGE INVESTORS TRUST SERIES 2005-A6 SERVED JAN-13-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PEREZ, DAVID

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF US BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION AS TRUSTEE, SUCCESSOR  IN INTEREST TO WACHOVIA BANK N.A. AS TRUSTEE FOR  MERRILL LYNCH MORTGAGE INVESTORS TRUST SERIES 2005-A6 RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HU, QI QUANG PEREZ, DAVID DOES 1 THRU 10, INCL. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 5662 MISSION STREET, UNIT #2, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94412, **INCLUDING ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES**
